summary: Well-structured Pester tests covering all core requirements (dimensions, include/exclude, max-parallel, fail-fast, matrix size validation, error handling, file I/O). Good organization with clear naming conventions. Main weaknesses: limited edge case coverage (single-valued dimensions, malformed JSON, type mismatches, boundary values like zero/negative max-parallel, null values in arrays), and no tests for file I/O errors or special character handling. Could benefit from helper functions/fixtures to reduce duplication. Would catch major regressions but miss subtle edge cases in production scenarios.
